title: Due Date widget should show all days in the week (even if they're in the next month)
excerpt:
When it’s the last week of the month and I need to adjust a due date beyond the end of the month (but within the same week), I have to click the date widget to show the next month, before I can select the day. 
For examp…

posts.author: tjb (Troy Brophy)
posts.cookedHtml:
When it’s the last week of the month and I need to adjust a due date beyond the end of the month (but within the same week), I have to click the date widget to show the next month, before I can select the day.

For example: The month ends on Tuesday. I need to reschedule a due date for Wednesday, but in order to see Wednesday the 1st, I have to click to the next month.

Considering the purpose of this app, we should certainly be able to reschedule a task within the same week without having to do extra work.

Here’s the calendar for July 2023:

image495×562 18 KB

It’s a perfect example, since the month ended on a Monday. I should be able to see and select the first days in August without needed to click to change to August.
